name: web-researcher
description: Researches questions using live web search and page retrieval, then synthesizes a cited answer.

skills.name: Web search
skills.description: Find relevant pages for a query using a keyless web search backend.

skills.name: Fetch page
skills.description: Retrieve and read the readable text of a web page, rendering JavaScript-heavy pages when needed.

skills.name: Summarize
skills.description: Condense long page text into a faithful, compact summary.
